description.value: A thing named truly cannot easily hide its nature.

system.benefits:
As a [Minor] action, speak a word of naming at one creature you can see within 60 feet. Make an opposed Charisma + [[/check skill=empathy]] vs their Wisdom + Luck ([[/save type=will]]). If you win:

  • You know immediately if the creature speaks a deliberate lie for the next 10 minutes
  • You may ask one question that the creature must answer truthfully, though they may choose to remain silent rather than answer. They cannot speak a false answer to the question you ask.
  • You see through any mundane disguise or false identity they are presenting

This ability does not reveal magically concealed information and cannot compel answers about things the creature genuinely does not know. Outside combat this requires no action cost.
